description: DreamCLI v0.1 MVP — Schema builder, parsing, inference, auto-help, basic errors, test harness

tasks.title: Project initialization: package.json, tsconfig, build tooling, test framework
tasks.description: Initialize the project with package.json (ESM-first), tsconfig.json (strict, NodeNext), vitest for testing, tsdown for building. Create src/ directory structure matching PRD architecture. Wire up biome for linting/formatting.

tasks.title: Structured error types (CLIError, ParseError, ValidationError)
tasks.description: Implement FR4 base error types: CLIError with message/code/exitCode/suggest/details/cause. Derive ParseError and ValidationError. These are foundational — every other module throws them.

tasks.title: Flag schema builder with type inference
tasks.description: Implement flag() builder: boolean, string, number, enum, array types. Each flag carries its type at the TS level. Support .default(), .alias(), .describe(), .required(), .env(), .config(). Type inference must flow — flag.enum(['us','eu']) yields 'us'|'eu'.

tasks.title: Arg schema builder with type inference
tasks.description: Implement arg() builder: string, number, custom parse. Support .required(), .optional(), .variadic(), .describe(). Type inference for positional args.

tasks.title: Command builder with flag/arg composition and type accumulation
tasks.description: Implement command() builder that chains .flag() and .arg() calls, accumulating types. .action() handler receives fully typed { args, flags, ctx, out }. Support .description(), .alias(), .hidden(), .examples().

tasks.title: Argv tokenizer and parser
tasks.description: Implement argv tokenization: --flag=value, --flag value, -f, -abc (combined short), --, positional args. Parse against command schema to produce typed raw values. Emit ParseError for unknown flags, type mismatches.

tasks.title: Resolution chain: CLI → default (env/config/prompt deferred)
tasks.description: Implement MVP resolution: CLI parsed values → default values. Required flag validation (error if not resolved). This is the simplified v0.1 chain; env/config/prompt come in v0.2/v0.3.

tasks.title: Auto-generated help text from schema
tasks.description: Generate help text from command schema: usage line, description, flags table (name, alias, type, default, description), args list. Support --help flag on all commands. Format for TTY width.

tasks.title: Output channel (out object for handlers)
tasks.description: Implement out object with log/info/warn/error methods. Basic TTY vs non-TTY detection. Foundation for FR5 — handlers use out instead of console.log.

tasks.title: Test harness: command.run() with injected state
tasks.description: Implement command.run(argv, options) that accepts injected env/config/stdin/stdout. Capture output. Return structured result with exitCode and output. This enables FR4's test-first design.

tasks.title: CLI entry point: cli() builder with command registration and run()
tasks.description: Implement cli() builder: .version(), .command(), .run(). Dispatches to correct command based on argv. Handles --help, --version at root. Wires runtime adapter (Node-only for MVP).

tasks.title: Runtime adapter interface + Node adapter
tasks.description: Define RuntimeAdapter interface (argv, env, cwd, isTTY, stdout/stderr/stdin). Implement Node adapter. Wire into cli().run() as default.
